mapper.select:
select * from kl_field where knowledge_id in
#{item}
mapper.insert:
insert into kl_field (id, knowledge_id, field_key, name, description, type, matchable, full_text_searchable, semantic_searchable, sortable, ord, boost) values
(#{item.id}, #{item.knowledgeId}, #{item.fieldKey}, #{item.name}, #{item.description}, #{item.type}, #{item.matchable}, #{item.fullTextSearchable}, #{item.semanticSearchable}, #{item.sortable}, #{item.ord}, #{item.boost})
mapper.delete:
delete from kl_field where knowledge_id in
#{item}
